title: Classic Dark Mode
description: A modern dark mode texture pack for Minecraft, with tons of mod support!
body:
Lots of people love dark mode — it’s easier on the eyes, especially at night, and it just looks cleaner. But Minecraft still doesn’t offer it!  
If that’s something you’ve been missing, this pack is made for you!

**Classic Dark Mode** darkens all major vanilla in-game GUIs — including inventories, menus, and more — by around 50%, while keeping the default style and feel of Minecraft intact. Brighter textures (like yellow buttons) are only reduced by ~40% to preserve visibility.

But that’s not all — this pack also includes tons of mod support, so you can enjoy your favourite mods and your favourite mode at the same time.

## Features:
- Darkened vanilla GUI while keeping the classic Minecraft look
- Support for dozens of popular mods
- Improved font visibility on menus using core shaders (works fine with Sodium!)

![Preview Image](https://i.postimg.cc/yxpmZ1r1/idk.png)

## Shaders Compatibility  
This pack uses core shaders to brighten the font on dark backgrounds like the title screen. It’s fully compatible with Sodium and other popular performance mods.

<details>
<summary>Supported mods (Some of the changes are very minor):</summary>

- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)
- [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
- [Entity Texture Features (ETF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
- [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph)
- [Resourceful Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-config)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Yet Another Config Lib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

</details>
